# PigeonGov v0.4.0

> Local-first, privacy-preserving government workflow platform for U.S. forms and applications
> 36 workflows | 26 MCP tools | 20 life events | 13 domains

## Quick Start
- Install: `npm install -g pigeongov`
- List workflows: `pigeongov list --json`
- Fill a workflow: `pigeongov fill tax/1040 --input data.json --json`
- Get input schema: `pigeongov schemas --workflow tax/1040 --json`
- MCP server: `pigeongov serve --port 3847`

## Domains
- tax: Federal and state tax returns, capital gains (Schedule D/8949), OBBB Act deductions, 10-state tax integration
- immigration: Visa, naturalization, work authorization
- healthcare: ACA enrollment, Medicare
- unemployment: Benefit claims
- education: FAFSA, student loans (SAVE transition, PSLF tracking), 529 plans
- benefits: SNAP, Medicaid, Section 8, WIC, LIHEAP, SSDI, SSI, TANF
- veterans: Disability claims, GI Bill, VA healthcare
- identity: Passport, name change, voter registration, Real ID
- legal: Small claims, expungement, child support modification
- estate: Wills, power of attorney, advance directives
- business: License planning
- permits: Local permit routing
- retirement: Social Security estimation

## For Agents
- Always use `--json` for structured output
- Use `--dry-run` before destructive operations
- Exit codes: 0=success, 2=warnings, 3=errors, 4=invalid input, 5=not found
- Use `pigeongov schemas --workflow <id> --json` for input/output shapes
- Use `pigeongov start <workflow-id> --json` to get starter data template
- Pipe commands: `pigeongov extract doc.pdf --json | pigeongov fill tax/1040 --stdin --json`
- Temporal deadlines: use `--date <YYYY-MM-DD>` flag to check deadlines relative to a specific date
- Dependency ordering: workflows expose prerequisite chains for multi-step plans

## Key Commands
- `pigeongov list [--domain <d>] --json` — list 36 workflows with metadata
- `pigeongov fill <id> --input <file> --json` — execute workflow from JSON input
- `pigeongov validate <bundle.json> --json` — validate a saved bundle
- `pigeongov review <bundle.json> --json` — get review summary
- `pigeongov extract <pdf...> --json` — extract data from documents
- `pigeongov deadlines [--workflow <id>] [--date <YYYY-MM-DD>] --json` — upcoming deadlines with temporal flag
- `pigeongov fees [--workflow <id>] --json` — filing fees
- `pigeongov glossary <term> --json` — explain government terminology
- `pigeongov screen --json` — universal eligibility screener
- `pigeongov life-event <event> --json` — action plan for 20 life events
- `pigeongov student-loans transition|pslf|compare --json` — SAVE transition, PSLF tracking, IDR plan comparison
- `pigeongov state-tax [state-code]|list --json` — state income tax calculator (CA, NY, IL, PA, OH, GA, MI, NC, NJ, VA)

## Privacy
All processing is local. No cloud uploads. No telemetry. No PII in logs. Never auto-submits to any government system.
